title: Gateway Distriparks is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Gateway Distriparks is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Gateway Distriparks family as a Warehouse Manager in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Gateway Distriparks:
Gateway Distriparks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gateway Distriparks!
